title: Both Lane command docs cite a non-existent 'Mode 4: Model-Benchmark' SKILL.md section as canonical source of truth; Step 1 routes the agent to 'Focus on Mode 4'
Stale comment in explicit.ts claims a single canonical projection node while a second live node deep-model-benchmark now exists

detail: spec_code partial: canonical-source pointer in command docs FAILS (dead Mode 4 anchor); EC-5 ordering, state-log inference, mode-aware records, provenance+history all PASS

direction: explicit.ts Lane B boosts inert (targeting non-node id)
reason: deep-model-benchmark IS a live projection node (projection.ts:122) + alias group (aliases.ts:33); boosts are live, not inert

direction: YAML step_run_benchmark omits --state-log so benchmark_run row is never written
reason: run-benchmark.cjs inferStateLogPath walks up outputs-dir to the 'improvement' dir, resolving to agent-improvement-state.jsonl which matches state_paths.state_log
